---
author: Pranav
execute: 
    freeze: true
format: 
    revealjs:
        theme: [serif,custom.scss]
        slide-number: true
        css: custom.css
        transition: slide
        transition-speed: default
        chalkboard: true
        margin: 0.1
---

# Parametric Study

## End Twist {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#twist-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#twist-error >}}
:::
::::

## Youngs Modulus {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#youngs-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#youngs-error >}}
:::
::::

## Radius {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#radius-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#radius-error >}}
:::
::::

## Density {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#density-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#density-error >}}
:::
::::

## End Vector {.r-stretch}
:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="58%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#vectr-main >}}
:::
::: {.column width="42%"}
{{< embed plotter.ipynb#vectr-error >}}
:::
::::
